text.title: SLO Burn Decision Matrix Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.description: Burn alerts fire; team debates in Slack; no consistent action.
antipattern.reason: Matrix authored but never wired to alerts.
antipattern.note: Fix: Add route-burn-alert.py webhook to alertmanager; matrix lookup posts action message + pages owner role.

antipattern.description: All burn alerts marked 'noted' in audit log; budget consistently exhausted at end of quarter.
antipattern.reason: Matrix lets cells default to accept.
antipattern.note: Fix: Replace default_cell with 'escalate'. Force explicit decision for any cell. Review accept rows monthly.

antipattern.description: Production freeze imposed 3 weeks ago; nobody remembers why; product team frustrated.
antipattern.reason: Freeze action had no revert criteria; became political.
antipattern.note: Fix: Backfill revert criteria. Run check-revert-criteria.py hourly. Auto-lift the freeze on criteria met.

antipattern.description: Q1 had 30 freezes; Q2 had 0; nobody knows why.
antipattern.reason: Audit log not analyzed; matrix never tuned.
antipattern.note: Fix: Build weekly trend dashboard from audit log. Tune cells with >5 triggers/quarter.
